action.reasoning: Observation: Best so far rmse_z500=428.3, achieved at epoch 10 with hidden=192, n_blocks=12 (~8M params). Model overfits after epoch 10. Analysis: I should add residual prediction (model predicts delta from last input snapshot), which is a strong inductive bias for autoregressive weather forecasting. Also use stronger weight decay and possibly slightly lower max LR. Aim for ~12-15 epochs to avoid overfitting. Decision: Modify model to support residual prediction, retrain with hidden=192, n_blocks=12, ~15 epochs, weight_decay=1e-4.
action.command: EPOCHS=15 BS=64 LR=3e-4 HIDDEN=192 NBLOCKS=12 WD=1e-4 DROP=0.05 python train.py
